fields.title: The Warehouse Job
fields.description: A rival crew's been stashing stolen goods in a port warehouse. Someone wants to know what's inside — or wants it gone.

fields.title: The Worst Day Job
fields.description: Odd job. Good pay. No questions.

fields.title: The Squeeze
fields.description: Collection job. Simple work. Good cut.

fields.title: Street Debt
fields.description: A crew contact says a corner boy is sitting on money that belongs to you. Go collect.

fields.title: The Middleman
fields.description: A contact needs a case walked across town. Simple job. Ten percent. Until it isn't.

fields.title: Corner Tax
fields.description: An east-side crew has been running protection on shops in your territory. Time to remind them where the lines are.
